steps.action: Glob search for .dockerignore in project root

evidence.fileContents:
# Dependencies
node_modules

# Version control
.git

# Secrets and environment
.env

# Test and coverage output
coverage

# Screenshot/image files
*.png

# Factory mission files
.factory

# Documentation
docs

# Development scripts
scripts

# Development config files
*.config.ts

# Docker compose (not needed in image)
docker-compose.yml

steps.action: Read .dockerignore and check for required patterns: node_modules, .git, .env, coverage, *.png
steps.expected: All five required exclusion patterns present
steps.observed: All five found: 'node_modules' (line under # Dependencies), '.git' (line under # Version control), '.env' (line under # Secrets and environment), 'coverage' (line under # Test and coverage output), '*.png' (line under # Screenshot/image files)

steps.action: Glob search for docker-stack.yml in project root
Read file to verify valid YAML structure
steps.observed: File parses as valid YAML with top-level 'services' key containing 'spandex-router' service definition

assertions.title: Stack file defines service with image, ports, and env configuration

steps.action: Read docker-stack.yml and verify service definition
steps.expected: Service defined with image, port mapping, and env configuration
steps.observed: Service 'spandex-router' defined with image '${DOCKER_IMAGE:-compare-dex-routers:latest}', ports '${PORT:-3000}:${PORT:-3000}', and env_file '.env'

steps.expected: Deploy section with update_config, restart_policy, healthcheck
steps.observed: Deploy section includes update_config (parallelism:1, delay:10s, order:start-first, failure_action:rollback), rollback_config, restart_policy (condition:on-failure, max_attempts:3), resource limits, and healthcheck (HTTP GET /health, interval:10s, timeout:5s, retries:3, start_period:15s)

summary: Tested 5 assertions: 5 passed, 0 failed. .dockerignore exists with all required exclusion patterns (node_modules, .git, .env, coverage, *.png) plus additional useful exclusions. docker-stack.yml exists with a fully configured spandex-router service including image, ports, env_file, rolling update config, restart policy, resource limits, and healthcheck.
